text: Realizing that people are broke and we don't want to charge them. So how do we charge someone else to sort of subsidize that?
context: Explaining Careerspan's business model shift to B2B to keep the consumer product free.

text: It's gonna be three years and seven days.
context: V precisely correcting the timeline of their company anniversary, showing meticulous attention to detail.

text: Yeah, I was gonna say most animals in the wild die by the 18 month mark too.
context: Extending Alex's point about startup mortality with a biological comparison to survival in nature.

text: Our masochism wavelength is the same.
context: Responding to shared trauma bonding from previous work together, describing aligned tolerance for difficulty.
